In this solo episode I break down how I would actually find profitable products to sell on Amazon FBA using real data instead of guessing. I walk through my process for scraping Amazon best sellers with OxyLabs, analyzing review counts, bestseller rank, and pricing to spot products where the demand is strong but the competition is still weak. Then I show how to take those winning ideas and source similar products from Alibaba, including a real example of a product that costs about $1.55 to manufacture and sells for around $30 on Amazon.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/16vlbFniP_r_tBIbpSkajLENz7CsD98FsiSvdtV61pNo/edit?usp=sharing

Enjoy!
